title: Adani Power Bags NSE Sustainability ‘Aspiring’ Award for ESG Performance - Sarkaritel.com
content:
Ahmedabad, Dec 16 (IANS): Adani Power Ltd has been recognized for its exceptional performance in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles by NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited.
The company received a score of 65, placing it in the “Aspiring” category, surpassing other major thermal and energy companies. This recognition reflects Adani Power’s dedication to sustainable growth and responsible business practices.
The company employs advanced emission management technologies, including ultra-super critical boilers, to reduce its carbon emissions and has invested in systems for continuous monitoring. It also champions water conservation through a zero liquid discharge system to protect local water resources.
Moreover, Adani Power emphasizes community development through initiatives focused on education, healthcare, and livelihood enhancement, including scholarships for underprivileged students and health camps. The company prioritizes the well-being of its workforce, implementing safety training and promoting diversity and inclusion.
On governance, Adani Power exceeds minimum regulatory requirements, boasting superior independent director representation in its committees compared to statutory guidelines. Additionally, the company maintains stringent ESG standards for suppliers and contractors, ensuring responsible practices throughout its value chain.
With an installed thermal power capacity of 18,110 MW across 12 power plants in various states and a 40 MW solar power plant in Gujarat, Adani Power continues to set benchmarks for sustainability in the energy sector.
